CVE-2016-1246.title: Buffer overflow in the DBD::mysql module before 4.037 for Perl al ...
CVE-2016-1246.description: Buffer overflow in the DBD::mysql module before 4.037 for Perl allows context-dependent attackers to cause a denial of service (crash) via vectors related to an error message.

CVE-2016-1249.title: The DBD::mysql module before 4.039 for Perl, when using server-si ...
CVE-2016-1249.description: The DBD::mysql module before 4.039 for Perl, when using server-side prepared statement support, allows attackers to cause a denial of service (out-of-bounds read) via vectors involving an unaligned number of placeholders in WHERE condition and output fields in SELECT expression.

CVE-2016-1251.title: There is a vulnerability of type use-after-free affecting DBD::my ...
CVE-2016-1251.description: There is a vulnerability of type use-after-free affecting DBD::mysql (aka DBD-mysql or the Database Interface (DBI) MySQL driver for Perl) 3.x and 4.x before 4.041 when used with mysql_server_prepare=1.

CVE-2017-10788.title: The DBD::mysql module through 4.043 for Perl allows remote attack ...
CVE-2017-10788.description: The DBD::mysql module through 4.043 for Perl allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (use-after-free and application crash) or possibly have unspecified other impact by triggering (1) certain error responses from a MySQL server or (2) a loss of a network connection to a MySQL server. The use-after-free defect was introduced by relying on incorrect Oracle mysql_stmt_close documentation and code examples.

CVE-2017-10789.title: The DBD::mysql module through 4.043 for Perl uses the mysql_ssl=1 ...
CVE-2017-10789.description: The DBD::mysql module through 4.043 for Perl uses the mysql_ssl=1 setting to mean that SSL is optional (even though this setting's documentation has a "your communication with the server will be encrypted" statement), which allows man-in-the-middle attackers to spoof servers via a cleartext-downgrade attack, a related issue to CVE-2015-3152.
